creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text: I haven't got much experience with the open/libressl from ports, but I can have a look at it once you've got something that builds.  My previous experience was with the Ice packaging for Debian and MacOS X homebrew, but I'll be happy to look at the port build.  [For both Debian and homebrew we historically had to patch it fairly extensively, but it looks a bit cleaner in 3.6.0]
